changes: Request queue page — users can view and manage their own requests; admins can review, approve, deny (with optional note), edit, or delete all requests
Per-user settings page — users can set region, language, notification preferences, and auto-request watchlist options
Admin per-user settings panel — full per-user controls for request limits, auto-approve overrides, elevated privileges, and notification preferences
Notification system — in-app bell with dropdown, Discord webhook (per-user and global), and Pushover push notifications
Elevated privileges role — admin-level flag per user with toggle in admin user panel
Auto-request from watchlist — global setting with per-user overrides for movies and TV shows
Changelog modal — version badge in the About panel opens a changelog history popup
Desktop user button redesigned — compact button matching the mobile FAB style with dropdown menu
Discord mode selector redesigned as a slide toggle (Webhook ↔ Bot Token) matching the site's toggle style
Bot mode shared-channel webhook option is now a toggle that reveals the URL field on demand
App Public URL setting moved to General Settings tab; enabling Discord bot mode without it set shows an error
Discord Server Invite Link — admins can set a non-expiring invite; users see a 'Join Server' prompt in their settings
Notification bell shows recent read notifications greyed out below unread; clicking 'Request available' navigates to the queue
Privileged user routing — elevated users receive admin-type notifications in addition to Plex admins
request_process_failed notification type added to Discord and Pushover agent type lists
Quality profile names persisted — saved profile name shown in the dropdown if Radarr/Sonarr is temporarily unreachable
Per-user admin settings page — action buttons for Re-sync Watched, Clear Watched, Clear Dismissals, Clear Requests
